since_last: 65% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.70%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 65% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.17% · BTC +2.43% · Gold +1.77% · Nasdaq100 -1.10%. 65% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.70%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.70%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.79%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.79%, APP +9.74%, META +9.72%, PLTR +8.71%, PATH +8.05%. Laggards: KLAC -10.54%, TER -9.82%, LRCX -9.68%, AMAT -9.50%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.38% at $159.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
